question: Find details of the services that no customer has ever used . Return the service details .
sql: SELECT Service_ID, Service_Details FROM Services WHERE Service_ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT Service_ID FROM Customers_and_Services UNION SELECT Service_ID FROM Customer_Interactions);

back_translation.intent: 查找未被关联或交互的服务信息
filters: Service_ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT Service_ID FROM Customers_and_Services UNION SELECT Service_ID FROM Customer_Interactions)

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求查找未被任何客户关联或使用的服务信息，SQL通过Service_ID NOT IN (子查询)实现该逻辑，子查询联合了两个来源（Customers_and_Services和Customer_Interactions）的Service_ID，最终从Services表获取对应服务的详细信息，完全匹配需求。
